conversations.content:
# Style Guide

1. Generate the final image in a top-corner orthographic view on a pure black background.
2. Images should be in an axis-align voxel style

## Prompt
The requested objects should be blue.

# Style Guide

1. Generate the final image in a top-corner orthographic view on a pure black background.
2. Images should be in an axis-align voxel style

## Prompt
The requested objects should be blue.
Make the monkey roughly 10x smaller but put 5 of them in the image in a circle

conversations.revisedPrompt: axis-aligned voxel style image on a pure black background, top-corner orthographic view. A blue voxel monkey holding a yellow banana, same style as reference, but each monkey is roughly 10x smaller than before. Five identical small blue voxel monkeys are arranged evenly spaced in a circle formation, all facing outward from the center of the circle. Maintain clean lighting and sharp voxel detail.
